rights.notes: Generated locally on owner machine. No upload or paid API. Empty storefront background selected to avoid real-person likeness and hand/face failures; repeated-trip motion is added accurately in Remotion.

findings: Pass: premium storefront background with strong navy/gold brand fit.
Pass: no people, no faces, no real-person likeness risk.
